title: Multi-threaded simulation can be non-deterministic with racy input

features.name: blocking与非blocking赋值跨always块竞争
features.description: Code should include two always @(posedge clk) blocks where one uses blocking assignment to write a variable and the other uses non-blocking assignment to read that same variable
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) begin a = a + 1; end
always @(posedge clk) begin b <= a + 1; end
